title: crepis runcinata subsp. imbricata
intro: Crepis runcinata subsp. imbricata, also known as the Rock Hawk's-bit, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata subsp. imbricata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential medicinal applications.
